name: GitHub — List Issues
description: Fetches open issues from a GitHub repo using PyGithub in a sandbox

script.value:
import os, json
from github import Github

token = os.environ.get('GITHUB_TOKEN', '')
repo_name = os.environ.get('REPO', 'rust-lang/rust')

if not token:
    print(json.dumps({'error': 'GITHUB_TOKEN env var required'}))
    raise SystemExit(1)

g = Github(token)
repo = g.get_repo(repo_name)
issues = repo.get_issues(state='open', sort='updated', direction='desc')[:10]

result = []
for issue in issues:
    result.append({
        'number': issue.number,
        'title': issue.title,
        'state': issue.state,
        'created_at': str(issue.created_at),
        'url': issue.html_url,
        'labels': [l.name for l in issue.labels]
    })

print(json.dumps({'repo': repo_name, 'count': len(result), 'issues': result}))
